items.name: BEST V2 Yuji Sukuna Avatar 2/??? - Shibuya Outline
items.description:
I am going to do a Yujikuna V2 in around February 2025. It will have a new torso, arm poses, and effects Fugue, Cleave and Dismantle., Domain Expansion, etc. This face is just if you want to use it with the old Yujikuna outfit. This face will be used for the Yujikuna V2 face

To find the old Yujikuna outfit, please go here:

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Yuji&Category=1&CreatorName=avatarverse&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

Head: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/390982/Living-Phone

Torso: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/374650/Endoskeleton-Bundle

Arms: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/1990/Cameraman-V1

105% Height
75% Width
100% Head
